title: aita for being mad at the laundromat worker for taking my clothes out of the dryer without my permission
text: i was doing laundry today and i was 3 minutes (i had a timer) late to get my clothes that were drying. i found them outside on a hamper. she said she took them out because they needed dryers.  however i had some problems with this: 1.)it was only 3 minutes 2.) i come here all the time, they know me and know i always get my stuff on time 3.) i feel that she was compensating for the fact that they have not done a good job in fixing 3 dryers that are out of service  4.) don’t like having others touch my stuff i try my best to get my clothes out of washing machine/dryer as fast as possible but i believe their failure to fix their equipment is putting their loyal customers in uncomfortable positions i’ll still keep going to them it wasn’t a bad argument just a tone change i’ll keep going and supporting the business but just didn’t like this happening

storyboard.content: I was doing laundry at a laundromat I go to all the time. They know me and know I always get my stuff on time. Three of their dryers are currently out of service.
I was 3 minutes late to get my clothes out of the dryer. I had a timer set.
The laundromat worker took my clothes out of the dryer and placed them on a hamper. She said she did it because other customers needed dryers.
I got upset with the worker and had a tone change with her about it, though it wasn't a bad argument.

I feel she was compensating for the fact that they haven't done a good job fixing the 3 out-of-service dryers, and their failure to maintain equipment is putting loyal customers in uncomfortable positions.
I don't like having others touch my stuff, and it was only 3 minutes.
